message:
feat(html): Add smart filename generation for HTML exports

Implement FilenameOptions and FilenameMetadata types with
generate_filename() function that creates cross-platform safe
filenames from session metadata.

Features:
- Optional date, agent, and project components
- Configurable max length with smart truncation
- Custom prefix and suffix support
- Windows/macOS/Linux filesystem compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
